Fault-Slip Data from Northern Norway

Source: R/data.R
osmundsen2010.Rd

198 measurements fault-slip measurements from a quarry in Røsand on the Lofoten-Vesterålen archipelago in Northern Norway

Usage

data('osmundsen2010')

Format

An object of class Pair

References

Osmundsen, P.T., Redfield, T.F., Hendriks, B.H.W., Bergh, S.G., Hansen, J.-A., Henderson, I.H.C., Dehls, J., Lauknes, T.R., Larsen, Y., Anda, E., Davidsen, B., 2010. Fault-controlled Alpine topography in Norway. Journal of the Geological Society 167, 83-98.

See also

Other datasets: angelier1990, example_lines, example_lines_df, example_planes, example_planes_df, gray_example, holst, hossack1968, ramsay, shebandowan, simongomez, strabo_prj

Examples

data("osmundsen2010")
head(osmundsen2010)
#> Pair object (n = 6):
#>   dip_direction dip    azimuth plunge
#> 1           312  52 312.000000     52
#> 2           310  64 310.000000     64
#> 3           314  40 340.096982     37
#> 4           310  48 310.000000     48
#> 5           348  47 332.938540     46
#> 6           342  48   3.188608     46
